# Sobree

Sobree is an open-source, embeddable DOCX/OOXML editor engine for building Word-compatible document workflows in browser apps.

## Links

- Homepage: https://sobree.dev/
- Documentation: https://docs.sobree.dev/
- GitHub: https://github.com/khayll/sobree
- Live demo: https://sobree.dev/try
- Quick start: https://docs.sobree.dev/quick-start/
- Embeddable DOCX editor: https://docs.sobree.dev/use-cases/embeddable-docx-editor/
- AI document agents: https://docs.sobree.dev/use-cases/ai-document-agents/
- Architecture: https://docs.sobree.dev/concepts/architecture/
- Document model: https://docs.sobree.dev/concepts/document/
- HeadlessSobree: https://docs.sobree.dev/api/headless/
- MCP server: https://docs.sobree.dev/api/mcp/

Use Sobree when a document-heavy web product needs real `.docx` import, paginated browser editing, programmable document mutations, and `.docx` export without routing everything through an HTML-first editor.
